settings.quote: The silhouettes feel premium without being hard to wear. It looks styled even on low-effort days.
settings.author: Rhea, Bengaluru

settings.quote: I bought the overshirt and ended up building three outfits around it in a week. That almost never happens.
settings.author: Arjun, Pune

settings.quote: The site feels like the brand: warm, clean, and a little more thoughtful than typical fast fashion.
settings.author: Sana, Mumbai

settings.heading: We design around the in-between hours people usually overlook.
settings.copy: The commute. The errand. The meeting that becomes dinner. Our collections are made to feel calm in motion, with soft structure and fabrics chosen for repeat wear, not one-photo moments.
settings.visit_copy: Drop by our studio or get first access to capsule launches.
